title: 3000mAh Li-ion Replacement for Hitachi Battery 10.8V BCL1015 BCL1030 BCL1030M BCL1030A 329370 329371 329389 331065
features: Type:Li-ion |Capacity: 3000mAh |Voltage: 10.8V-12V |Replace for Hitachi 10.8V Batteries. Made of high quality, environmentally friendly, efficient, stable and long-lasting batteries.

Compatible with HITACHI: Replacement battery for Hitachi BCL1015 BCL1015S BCL1030 BCL1030M BCL1030A 329369, 329370, 329371, 329389, 331065. 100% Professional replacement batteries, fully compatible with the internal configuration of the power tool, work as well as the original batteries.

Quality Assurance: CE & RoHS Certification,tested by the manufacturer for compliance with OEM products .Safeguard features against incorrect voltage, battery overload, short circuit, internal overheating.
High Quality Batteries: No Memory Effect , can be charged or discharged as needed without loss of capacity,it's no need to charge it to full or discharge full in use, much more convenient.
SERVICE: If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact us, we will do our best to serve you.
description: Specification: Voltage:10.8V Capacity: 3000mAh Battery Type: Lithium Ion Battery Cells Compatible with: for Hitachi BCL1015 for Hitachi BCL1015S for Hitachi BCL1030 for Hitachi BCL1030M for Hitachi BCL1030A for Hitachi 331065 for Hitachi 329369 for Hitachi 329370 for Hitachi 329371 for Hitachi 329389 for Hitachi HXP 10.8v Works with: for Hitachi Cordless Drills, Drivers, and Wrenches: DB10DL, DB3DL, DS10DFL, FDB10DL, FDB10DFL, FDS10DFL, FWH10DCL, FWH10DFL, FWH10DL, WH10DCL, WH10DFL, WH10D for Hitachi Cordless Jigsaws, Reciprocating Saws: CJ10DL, CR10DL, FCR10DL for Hitachi Cordless Flashlights: UB10DL, UB10DAL for Hitachi Mini Grinders: GP10DL for Hitachi Lawn Clippers / Grass Shears: CG10DL / FCG10DL, FCH10DL Notice: 1.Please make sure the product that you are going to buy fits the brand, model and part number 2.Please store it in a dry, clean, cool, away from heat and metal objects 3.After use,it is recommended that the battery be cooled and then recharged 4.When the battery is not used for a long time, it is recommended to charge the battery once a month
